sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Underground cave system located. The colony feels hopeful. My paranoia grows stronger.
Year 18 on Mars. Underground cave system located. Morale is hopeful. We have 1228 food units left.
Population: 14. Underground cave system located. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Selene.
